description: Verso: Fragment of a legal document or draft. Mentions the maṭbakh (sugar refinery) known by the name of "the sons of al-Lebdī" (awlād al-Lebdī); a deed (sheṭar) in the writer's possession, and an Arabic-script document. Related to T-S NS J215 (PGPID 26372).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
